# Patterns

Reusable implementation, review, QA, or workflow patterns for future agents and maintainers.

## Entry format

```markdown
## YYYY-MM-DD - Pattern title

- Context: when this pattern applies
- Pattern: repeatable approach or checklist
- Evidence: command output, file path, PR, or review that validated it
- Source: issue, PR, review, or local workflow that produced it
```

## Safety

Do not store secrets, credentials, personal data, private customer data, or temporary one-off notes here.
